requested_action: Perform read-only security review of the M7 save migration compatibility boundary and cloud-save candidate non-implementation boundary. Verify no account, network sync, telemetry, secrets, server persistence, provider integration, implicit RPC, object graph serialization, or Electron security weakening was introduced.
source_commit_note: Writer handoff commit is null because the lead committed the reviewed implementation after validating the handoff; review branch head is the implementation commit.
acceptance_focus: Define and validate M7 save migration compatibility boundaries for accepted save/content manifest versions, including rejection behavior for malformed, future, cross-manifest, and unsafe migration inputs.
Cloud-save remains a candidate decision boundary only: no account system, paid service, secrets, network sync, server, telemetry, remote collection, or cloud provider integration is implemented.
Any irreversible migration, cloud-save enablement, account-backed persistence, or frozen save-format/platform decision routes to Human Gate and security review before implementation.
Save/protocol payloads remain explicit, serializable, versioned, and parser-validated; no object graph serialization or implicit RPC is introduced.
Compatibility tests cover M1-M6 accepted saves and the M7 Beta content-lock candidate manifests before M7 exit.

delivery.note: Lead spawned a real read-only security_reviewer with route content in the initial prompt.
